title: Stemaria
description: This mod adds new item and block to cultive resources as blocks
body:
![Croparia](https://imgur.com/37AJd1Y.png)

This Mod adds stems for cultivation of resources as blocks, it needs ***Croparia*** to work !.

How to craft the seeds :
For example, if you want to craft a redstone stem seed :
Do a ritual tier 2 with redstone blocks and a redstone crop seed

 
It adds 48 New Stems (Vanilla) !
